docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS

NTC OF MO & MO TO COMPEL ANS TO INTERROGS & REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS & FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOLM, PATRICIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF PRO PER ON APR-28-2005 THROUGH JUN-30-2005 FILED BY DEFENDANT MCCOLM, PATRICIA
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO RESPONDENT MCCOLM, PATRICIA

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT RESPONDENT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST RESPONDENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $156.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
